channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Witness records Israeli strike on building in Lebanon’s Tyre
item.description: Video captured the moment an Israeli strike targeted a building in Burj Shamali in Lebanon’s Tyre district.

item.title: Vehicles burn in Israel after being hit with Iranian projectile debris
item.description: Video shows vehicles on fire in central Israel after debris from an intercepted Iranian projectile struck Ramat Gan.

item.title: Israeli strikes damage hospital in Lebanon’s Tyre; ground invasion advances
item.description: At least 11 people are injured as Israel strikes near the Lebanese Italian Hospital in Tyre, damaging the facility.

item.title: Projectile hits near Iran’s Bushehr nuclear plant, killing one: IAEA
item.description: Tehran says it is the fourth attack near the nuclear plant amid the US-Israel war on Iran.

item.title: At least four people killed in Russian attacks on Ukraine
item.description: At least one person has also died in a Ukrainian attack on Russia's southern Rostov region.

item.title: Iran executes two convicted members of banned opposition group
item.description: Abolhassan Montazer and Vahid Baniamerian have been hanged after Iran's Supreme Court upheld their sentences.

item.title: Iran war: What is happening on day 36 of US-Israeli attacks?
item.description: Iran claims responsibility for downing two US warplanes, as search under way for missing crewmember.

item.title: Iranian missile attack hits residential areas in central Israel
item.description: An Iranian missile attack has caused damage across residential areas in central Israel, according to Israeli media.

item.title: Iran war live: US-Israel attacks hit petrochemical, nuclear sites in Iran
item.description: US and Israel step up attacks on Iran civilian infrastructure as search for downed US pilot continues.

item.title: Video shows the moment a Russian drone hit an apartment in Ukraine
item.description: Russia has unleashed a massive round of deadly air strikes across Ukraine, in a so-called "Easter escalation."
